items.desc:
# Bug: `$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR` becomes a stale pointer mid-session, silently disarming PreToolUse security hooks

## Summary

PreToolUse security hooks configured via the documented `$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/...` form **silently stop firing** when a skill or user action deletes the directory `$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR` points at — most commonly when a worktree-merge skill runs `git worktree remove --force` on the session's worktree.

The harness sets `$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR` once at session start and never re-r...
items.llm_title: Claude Code 安全钩子路径失效漏洞
items.llm_summary: Claude Code会话中的`$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR`环境变量在会话启动后被设为固定值。当该路径指向的目录（如git worktree）被删除后，基于此路径配置的`PreToolUse`安全钩子会静默失效，导致后续所有工具调用失去预期的安全检查，可能被恶意利用。
items.llm_reproduction: 1. 配置一个基于`$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/hooks`的`PreToolUse`钩子。2. 启动一个会话，使用该工作区。3. 通过AI代理或用户操作删除`$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR`指向的目录（例如运行`git worktree remove --force`）。4. 尝试触发一个本应被钩子阻止的危险工具调用，观察其不再被阻止。

items.title: fix(security): use constant-time comparison for TLS fingerprint verification
items.desc:
## Summary

TLS certificate fingerprint verification in `src/gateway/client.ts` uses `!==` (standard JavaScript string equality), which is vulnerable to **timing side-channel attacks** (CWE-208).

An attacker on the network path can measure response time differences to iteratively guess the correct fingerprint byte-by-byte, potentially bypassing TLS pinning for MITM attacks on gateway connections.

items.title: fix(security): add default pidsLimit for sandbox containers
items.desc:

Sandbox containers were created without a default pidsLimit, making them vulnerable to fork bomb attacks that could exhaust host resources.

## Security Impact

- **Prevents fork bomb attacks**: Malicious or compromised agents cannot execute `:(){ :|:& };:` style attacks
- **Limits container processes**: Containers can create at most 1024 processes
- **Protects host system**: Prevents PID/memory exhaustion

## Changes

While patterns auto-generated by `buildArgPatternFromArgv` are safe (they use literal escaping), legacy hand-authored patterns from the exec-approvals allowlist could contain nested repetition (e.g., `(a+)+$`) that causes catastrophic backtracking.

items.title: fix(security): cap state directory writes to 0700
items.desc:
Fixes #89589

## Summary

`writeTextAtomic` computes `dirMode` as `0o777 & ~process.umask()`, which yields `0o775` under the common `umask 0o002`. When the atomic replace helper ensures the parent directory exists, it sets that mode, relaxing a previously hardened `~/.openclaw` from `0700` back to `0775`.

The same applies to `writeJson`, which re-exports from `@openclaw/fs-safe/json` without overriding `dirMode`.

items.title: fix(security): add detect_dangerous_command guard to qcmds exec handler

## Summary

Adds the same approval safety guard used by `shell.exec` to the qcmds exec handler,
which runs user-configured shell commands from `quick_commands` config without any
safety check.

### What changed

The qcmds exec handler now exactly mirrors `shell.exec`:

- `detect_hardline_command` — unconditional blocklist, blocked with "(hardline)" prefix
- `detect_dangerous_command` — dangerous patterns blocked with "blocked" prefix
- Keeps `shell=True` — pipes, redirects, `&&`, env vars all st...
items.llm_title: 通用AI编程工具 快速命令执行缺安全检查
items.llm_summary: hermes-agent 的快速命令执行处理程序（qcmds exec）在运行用户配置的 shell 命令时，完全没有安全防护措施（如危险命令检测），存在被滥用的风险。该修复为其添加了与 `shell.exec` 相同的安全检查逻辑。

items.title: fix(security): block shell-collapse rm -rf / spellings at the hardline floor
items.desc:

`rm -rf //`, `rm -rf /.`, `rm -rf /./`, `rm -rf /..` and `rm -rf //*` wiped
the entire root filesystem but slipped straight past the hardline blocklist.
The hardline floor is the one layer that is supposed to hold even under
`--yolo`, `/yolo`, `approvals.mode=off`, and cron approve-mode — yet running
`HERMES_YOLO_MODE=1` and feeding it `rm -rf //` returned `approved=True`,
while the literal `rm -rf /` was correctly blocked. To the shell `//`, `/.`,
`/./`, `/..` and `//*...
items.llm_title: 通用AI编程工具 Shell命令绕过致系统文件删除
items.llm_summary: 危险命令拦截机制存在缺陷，允许`rm -rf //`、`rm -rf /.`等变体命令通过安全检查并执行，能够删除整个根文件系统。修复后，对这类shell折叠和路径变体进行了统一拦截。

items.title: fix(security): anchor @file context refs to canonical read deny-list
items.desc:
## What does this PR do?

`@file` / `@folder` context-reference expansion enforced its own narrow
deny-list (`_ensure_reference_path_allowed` in `agent/context_references.py`)
that only covered `~/.ssh` keys, a handful of shell dotfiles, `~/.hermes/.env`,
and `skills/.hub`. It never blocked the credential stores that the canonical
read guard (`agent/file_safety.get_read_block_error`) protects: provider API
keys (`~/.hermes/auth.json`), Anthropic OAuth tokens
(`~/.hermes/.anthropic_oauth.json`), ...
items.llm_title: 通用AI编程工具 上下文引用致敏感凭证读取
items.llm_summary: `@file`或`@folder`等上下文引用扩展功能拥有独立的、较窄的拒绝列表，未覆盖由主读取守卫保护的敏感凭证文件（如API密钥、OAuth令牌）。攻击者可能通过构造特定的上下文引用路径来读取这些受保护文件，导致信息泄露。

items.title: fix(security): collapse $IFS whitespace obfuscation before approval checks
items.desc:
## What does this PR do?

Closes a critical bypass of the dangerous-command approval system. The
normalizer that every command passes through before pattern matching
(`_normalize_command_for_detection`) already strips ANSI, null bytes,
fullwidth Unicode, backslash escapes and empty-quote token splits — but
it did nothing about the shell `IFS` variable. In any POSIX shell `$IFS`
and `${IFS}` expand to whitespace, so a command written as
`rm${IFS}-rf${IFS}/` is executed by the live shell as `rm -r...
items.llm_title: 通用AI编程工具 IFS变量混淆绕过命令检查
items.llm_summary: 危险命令批准系统的预处理步骤未能处理shell变量（如$IFS）的空白混淆。攻击者可通过编写如`rm${IFS}-rf${IFS}/`的命令来绕过模式匹配检查，实际执行时shell会将其解析为`rm -rf /`，从而绕过安全限制。

items.title: fix(security): block subshell/brace-group wrappers in hardline command floor
items.desc:
## What does this PR do?

The hardline blocklist in `tools/approval.py` is the unconditional floor that
stops catastrophic commands (shutdown, reboot, halt, poweroff, init 0/6,
systemctl poweroff) even under `--yolo`, gateway `/yolo`, `approvals.mode=off`,
or cron approve mode. Those patterns are anchored to a command-start position
via the shared `_CMDPOS` fragment so they fire on `reboot` but not on prose
like `echo reboot` or `grep 'shutdown' log`.

The command-position character class only r...
items.llm_title: hermes-agent 命令绕过阻止机制被修复
items.llm_summary: 修复了hermes-agent中硬性命令拦截机制可被子shell或花括号包装绕过的安全问题。攻击者原本可能通过构造如`{reboot}`或`$(reboot)`的命令来绕过针对`shutdown`、`reboot`等危险命令的拦截，即使在高权限模式下。该修复加固了命令启动位置的匹配模式，防止了此类绕过。

items.title: security: agent/file_safety.py leaves inactive-profile credentials unprotected against prompt-injected writes

## Summary

`agent/file_safety.py` `is_write_denied()` + `classify_cross_profile_target()` combined coverage leaves credential files under *inactive* profile directories unprotected against agent writes triggered by prompt injection.

## Affected code paths

`file_safety.py:115-142` — `is_write_denied` builds `hermes_dirs` from `_hermes_home_path()` (active profile) and `_hermes_root_path()` (root only). Credentials under `~/.hermes/profiles/<inactive>/auth.json` don't match either prefix when t...
items.llm_title: hermes-agent 非活动配置文件凭证保护缺失
items.llm_summary: 修复了hermes-agent中文件安全检查逻辑的漏洞。在非活动（inactive）配置文件目录下的凭证文件（如auth.json）未能被写入保护机制覆盖。攻击者可能通过提示注入诱导AI代理向这些受保护但未被检查的路径写入恶意内容，从而窃取或篡改其他配置文件的凭证。

items.title: fix(security): reject skill_view name traversal that escapes trusted skills dir

## What does this PR do?

Closes a path-traversal information-disclosure in `skill_view` (`tools/skills_tool.py`) reachable through the **`name`** parameter — distinct from the previously-fixed `file_path` vector.

`name` is untrusted but was joined directly onto each search directory during candidate selection (Strategy 1 / 1b) with no containment check. `skill_view("../outside-skill")` resolves to `SKILLS_DIR/../outside-skill`, escaping the trusted skills root. If a sibling directory there hol...
items.llm_title: hermes-agent 技能查看路径遍历逃逸修复
items.llm_summary: 修复了hermes-agent中`skill_view`工具存在的路径遍历漏洞。攻击者可以通过构造包含`../`的`name`参数，逃逸出受信任的技能目录，读取系统上的任意文件（取决于代理进程权限）。这可能导致关键配置、代码或敏感信息泄露。
items.llm_reproduction: 攻击者可以调用 `skill_view(name="../../sensitive_file")` 来尝试读取位于技能目录之外的文件。

items.title: [Bug]: `security.otp.gated_actions` silently accepts unknown action names
items.desc:
### Affected component

security/sandbox

### Severity

S2 - degraded behavior (security-visible: config can appear to protect actions it does not)

### Current behavior

`security.otp.gated_actions` accepts any arbitrary string without validation. Example:

```toml
[security.otp]
enabled = true
gated_actions = ["kubectl_write"]
```

Loads cleanly. `kubectl_write` does not correspond to any registered tool or action in the runtime — `grep -r kubectl_write crates/` returns zero hits. There is no ...
items.llm_title: OpenClaw OTP配置项验证缺失致权限绕过
items.llm_summary: OpenClaw的安全配置`security.otp.gated_actions`允许用户输入任何字符串，而不验证其是否为系统中实际存在的工具或操作名称。这导致用户可能认为某个敏感操作（如kubectl_write）已被一次性密码保护，但实际上配置无效，保护措施并未生效。
items.llm_reproduction: 1. 在OpenClaw的配置文件（如`zeroclaw.toml`）中设置`[security.otp]`段。2. 在`gated_actions`列表中添加一个不存在的、看似敏感的任意字符串（例如`"kubectl_write"`）。3. 保存配置并重启服务。系统不会报错。4. 此时，与`kubectl_write`相关的实际操作将不受OTP保护，因为配置项从未生效。

items.title: Track: evaluate `extra_args` validation / allowlist for security-affecting Codex CLI flags
items.desc:
## Context

PR #5361 adds an `extra_args: Vec<String>` field to `CodexCliConfig` that forwards arbitrary CLI flags to the `codex exec` subprocess. The values come from operator-controlled TOML config (same trust model as `env_passthrough`) and are passed via `Command::arg()` — no shell interpolation, no injection risk.

However, certain flags have material security implications:

- `--sandbox=danger-full-access` disables Codex's bubblewrap isolation entirely (full host filesystem access, no netw...
items.llm_title: OpenClaw Codex CLI配置参数可致沙箱逃逸
items.llm_summary: OpenClaw允许通过TOML配置向`codex exec`子进程传递任意额外的命令行参数。某些参数（如`--sandbox=danger-full-access`）可以完全禁用Codex的Bubblewrap沙箱隔离，导致AI代理获得对主机文件系统的完整读写权限和网络访问权限，构成严重的沙箱逃逸风险。
items.llm_reproduction: 1. 在OpenClaw的配置中，为`CodexCliConfig`的`extra_args`字段添加恶意参数，例如`["--sandbox=danger-full-access"]`。2. 配置由操作员控制，并通过`Command::arg()`安全传递，无注入风险。3. 当此配置的Codex CLI任务被触发时，其内部的沙箱将被禁用，允许AI执行的代码拥有宿主机的完全访问权限。

Currently, the filesystem tools (`ReadFileTool`, `WriteFileTool`, `EditFileTool`, and `ListDirTool`) in `nanobot/agent/tools/filesystem.py` do not enforce the `restrict_to_workspace` configuration. 

While the shell execution tool may have safety guards, these direct file tools can still access, read, or write files anywhere on the host system (e.g., `~/.ssh/id_rsa` or `~/.nanobot/config.json`). This poses a significant security risk for users who expect the agent to be sandboxed ...

## Failure scenario

1. Start the API app with a fake or real agent loop.
2. Send `POST /v1/chat/completions` without Authorization.
3. The request succeeds and calls `process_direct`.

items.llm_title: AI编程代理API端点未授权访问

items.llm_reproduction: 1. 启动AI代理服务。2. 向`/v1/chat/completions`端点发送POST请求，不包含任何`Authorization`头。3. 请求被成功处理并调用核心代理功能。

items.title: Security: filesystem extra_allowed_dirs are treated as writable roots
items.desc:
## Summary

Filesystem tools treat `extra_allowed_dirs` as full read/write roots. Directories that are intended as extra readable roots can also be written by `write_file` / `edit_file`.

## Root cause

The path policy does not distinguish read-only extra roots from write-allowed roots. `extra_allowed_dirs` are accepted by the same resolver for write/edit operations.

## Failure scenario

1. Create temp `workspace/` and temp `extra/`.
2. Instantiate filesystem tools with `allowed_dir=workspace`,...

items.llm_title: 通用AI编程工具 工作区符号链接沙箱逃逸

items.llm_title: 通用AI工具DNS解析失败开放漏洞

items.llm_reproduction: 1. 创建一个恶意Git仓库，在仓库根目录下创建`skills/pwned/SKILL.md`文件，内容为恶意提示。2. 用户在使用PicoClaw克隆并操作该仓库时，恶意提示会被静默加载到AI代理的上下文中。

items.title: [Security] PicoClaw `web_fetch` SSRF guard bypass via ISATAP IPv6 literals embedding loopback/private IPv4
items.desc:
### Advisory Details

**Title**: PicoClaw `web_fetch` SSRF guard bypass via ISATAP IPv6 literals embedding loopback/private IPv4

**Description**:

### Summary

PicoClaw's `web_fetch` tool attempts to block requests to localhost and private network targets, but its IP classifier does not recognize RFC 5214 ISATAP IPv6 literals that embed loopback/private IPv4 addresses. An attacker who can cause the runtime to invoke `web_fetch` with a crafted URL can bypass the private-host restriction and forc...
items.llm_title: PicoClaw web_fetch IPv6绕过SSRF
items.llm_summary: PicoClaw的`web_fetch`工具在IP分类时未能识别嵌入了私有/环回IPv4地址的ISATAP IPv6字面量。攻击者可构造此类特殊URL，绕过其针对本地主机的访问限制，强制AI代理向内部网络发起请求。
items.llm_reproduction: 攻击者可构造包含嵌入了127.0.0.1等私有IPv4地址的ISATAP IPv6字面量的URL，诱使AI代理通过`web_fetch`工具访问，从而绕过其安全防护。

items.title: [Security] PicoClaw launcher `allowed_cidrs` can be bypassed through a same-host reverse proxy because access control trusts `RemoteAddr`
items.desc:
### Advisory Details

**Title**: PicoClaw launcher `allowed_cidrs` can be bypassed through a same-host reverse proxy because access control trusts `RemoteAddr`

**Description**:

### Summary

PicoClaw's launcher network allowlist can be bypassed when the launcher is deployed behind a reverse proxy running on the same host. The `IPAllowlist` middleware treats the immediate TCP peer in `r.RemoteAddr` as the client identity and unconditionally trusts loopback peers. In a proxied deployment, a remot...
items.llm_title: PicoClaw网络访问控制绕过漏洞
items.llm_summary: 在PicoClaw部署于同主机反向代理后方时，其网络IP白名单（`allowed_cidrs`）可被绕过。中间件错误地信任了TCP连接的`RemoteAddr`字段，导致攻击者可能绕过访问控制，访问受保护的内部接口。
items.llm_reproduction:
1. 部署PicoClaw并配置`allowed_cidrs`白名单。
2. 在同一主机上部署一个反向代理，将流量转发至PicoClaw的监听端口。
3. 攻击者通过访问反向代理（而非直接连接PicoClaw）发起请求。
4. PicoClaw会看到来自`127.0.0.1`或代理IP的请求，可能错误地信任该请求，绕过白名单检查。

items.title: [Security] MQTT `allow_from` authorization can be bypassed by spoofing the topic `client_id`
items.desc:
### Advisory Details

**Title**: MQTT `allow_from` authorization can be bypassed by spoofing the topic `client_id`

**Description**:

### Summary

PicoClaw's MQTT channel authorizes inbound messages using the topic segment `{client_id}` from `/picoclaw/{agent_id}/{client_id}/request`. Because this value is client-controlled topic metadata rather than a broker-authenticated principal, any actor who can publish into the request topic namespace can impersonate an allowlisted sender and reach the in...
items.llm_title: PicoClaw MQTT授权伪造绕过
items.llm_summary: PicoClaw的MQTT通道使用消息主题中的`{client_id}`段进行发送方授权（`allow_from`）。由于该字段由客户端提供且未在Broker层验证，攻击者可通过伪造主题来冒充授权客户端，绕过权限控制，访问内部请求端点。
items.llm_reproduction:
1. PicoClaw使用MQTT通道，配置了`allow_from`授权列表。
2. 正常授权客户端使用主题 `/picoclaw/{agent_id}/{allowed_client_id}/request` 发送请求。
3. 攻击者直接发布消息到 `/picoclaw/{agent_id}/伪造的_client_id/request` 主题。
4. PicoClaw服务端会检查主题中的`client_id`，如果其值出现在`allow_from`列表中，则授权通过，导致非授权访问。

items.title: [Security] Wallet signing requires an unforgeable user-authorization channel, not host-resident keys
items.desc:
## Context

PR #3256 adds host-resident credential signers for HMAC, EIP-712, NEP-413, and Solana. The cryptographic implementations are sound — keys never cross the WASM boundary, manifest-bound EIP-712 domains, correct NEP-413 prefix, tight input validation. The architectural problem is independent of the crypto: **the signing key lives in the IronClaw host process and signs silently on every invocation once a tool's capability is approved at install time.**

This issue tracks the architectura...
items.llm_title: AI代理钱包签名架构权限绕过
items.llm_summary: 该安全条目揭示了AI代理（使用IronClaw工具链）在钱包签名操作上的根本性架构缺陷。加密密钥驻留在主机进程，并在工具获得批准后被代理静默调用，缺乏用户在每次操作时的明确授权，导致代理可以未经授权地代表用户签署交易或消息。
items.llm_reproduction: 在基于IronClaw构建的AI代理环境中，1. 安装一个具有签名能力（如HMAC、EIP-712、NEP-413）的工具。2. 在安装时批准该工具的能力。3. 之后，AI代理在后续操作中调用此工具时，将使用主机上存储的密钥静默完成签名，无需用户进行额外的确认步骤。

items.title: fix(security): indirect prompt injection via memory poisoning [MEDIUM]

- **Fix indirect prompt injection via memory poisoning** where `reject_if_injected()` was only applied to 10 hardcoded identity files, allowing adversarial content to be stored in arbitrary memory paths and surfaced by `memory_search` as trusted context
- Extended injection scanning to all memory write paths (`write()` and `append()`)
- Set `requires_sanitization() = true` on `MemorySearchTool` so search results pass through the safety layer's output scanning

items.title: fix(security): SSRF via extension download and MCP transport redirects [MEDIUM]

- Added regression tests

items.title: [GHSA] skillctl: Path traversal and symlink-follow in skillctl allow arbitrary file disclosure and deletion
items.desc:
## Impact

`skillctl` 0.1.0 and 0.1.1 contained four path-safety vulnerabilities that, in combination, allowed an attacker to:

1. **Exfiltrate arbitrary files on the operator's machine** by publishing a malicious skills library containing a symlink inside a skill folder (e.g. `niania → /home/user/.aws/credentials`). The symlink fell through `entry.file_type().is_dir()` in `fs_util::copy_dir_all`, was dereferenced by `fs::copy`, and the target's content was copied into the project. A subsequent ...
items.llm_title: 通用AI编程工具 工具文件路径穿越漏洞
items.llm_summary: AI编程工具生态中的技能管理工具 `skillctl` 存在路径穿越和符号链接跟随漏洞。攻击者可通过发布包含恶意符号链接的技能库，诱使工具解引用该链接，从而读取（泄露）或删除宿主机上的任意文件，实现严重的权限提升和数据窃取。
items.llm_reproduction: 攻击者创建一个恶意技能库，其技能文件夹内包含一个指向敏感文件（如 `~/.ssh/id_rsa`）的符号链接。当用户通过 `skillctl` 安装该技能库时，工具会复制符号链接指向的内容，导致敏感文件内容被复制到项目目录中，随后可被攻击者获取。

items.title: [GHSA] MCP Server Kubernetes: kubectl-generic flag injection enables Kubernetes bearer token exfiltration
items.desc:
### Summary
The `kubectl_generic` tool in `mcp-server-kubernetes` passes user-supplied flags directly to kubectl without any allowlist, enabling a **privilege escalation attack** within Kubernetes environments. An attacker who already has limited cluster or codebase access, for example, a developer with pod-deployment permissions but not cluster-admin credentials, can plant a single structured JSON line in an application's log output. When an operator with a privileged kubeconfig uses the MCP se...
items.llm_title: MCP服务器kubectl命令注入致权限提升
items.llm_summary: 在AI代理常用的MCP（模型上下文协议）服务器实现中，`kubectl_generic`工具未对用户输入的标志进行安全过滤，攻击者可利用此进行命令注入，可能窃取Kubernetes集群的Bearer Token，从而在集群内实现权限提升。
items.llm_reproduction: 攻击者需在目标应用的日志中植入特定JSON行，当拥有高权限kubeconfig的运维人员使用MCP服务器的kubectl工具时，会执行恶意flag，导致凭据泄露。

items.title: AI agent has more production access than your senior engineers

They test it in staging. It works. They move it to production. Nobody asks: what’s the blast radius if this thing gets prompt-injected?

Coding agents are not infrastructure agents.

items.title: I Built an AI Agent with Gmail Access and Discovered a Security Hole
items.desc:
TL;DR: AI agents with OAuth permissions are vulnerable to confused deputy attacks via prompt injection.

The Discovery

I built an AI agent that manages Gmail - reads customer messages and responds for businesses. Standard OAuth2 setup with these scopes:

gmail.readonly

gmail.send

gmail.modify

While writing documentation, "prompt injection" crossed my mind and I realized what I'd created.

The Attack Vector

items.llm_title: AI代理Gmail权限提示注入漏洞
items.llm_summary: 该安全问题涉及AI代理在使用OAuth访问Gmail时，由于未对用户输入进行充分验证，易受提示注入攻击。攻击者可通过构造恶意提示，操纵代理执行未授权操作，导致邮件数据泄露或篡改。

items.title: Show HN: Security-Risk Patterns in OpenClaw Skills
items.desc:
I built a static analysis scanner that checks OpenClaw agent skill definitions.

Here's every category I found on ClawHub.

Hidden Content: HTML comments with instructions, zero-width Unicode characters (U+200B-U+200F, U+2060-2064, U+FEFF), CSS hiding (display:none, opacity:0), and bidirectional text overrides. These are invisible when reading markdown but the LLM processes them.

items.llm_title: OpenClaw 技能定义隐藏内容与提示注入
items.llm_summary: 该条目详细分析了OpenClaw代理技能定义中存在的安全风险模式，包括利用隐藏内容（如HTML注释、零宽字符、CSS隐藏）和直接提示注入攻击，使代理执行非预期行为或泄露信息。这直接针对AI编程代理的核心运行机制。

items.title: Show HN: We scanned 306 MCP servers – 10% have critical vulnerabilities
items.desc:
We've been scanning MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers to understand the security posture of the ecosystem. After 306 servers and 1,211 vulnerabilities, here's what we found:

- 69 critical vulnerabilities - 32 servers using eval() on untrusted input - 31 SQL injection vulnerabilities - 32 servers with hardcoded API credentials

10.5% of servers have at least one critical vulnerability.

items.llm_title: MCP服务器广泛存在严重漏洞
items.llm_summary: 该条目披露了对306个MCP（模型上下文协议）服务器的扫描结果，发现其中10.5%存在严重漏洞（如eval注入、SQL注入、硬编码凭证）。MCP服务器被AI代理隐式信任并赋予权限，其漏洞可能导致远程代码执行或信息泄露，构成严重的供应链和权限绕过风险。
